adminWelcomeDescription: Finish admin account security first, then configure upstreams, platform models, billing, logs, identity providers, and system policies.
userWelcomeDescription: Finish your profile and security setup before using chats, files, tools, memory, and sharing.
themePresetDescription: Choose an interface theme. You can change it later in settings.
personalizationDescription: Confirm your regional timezone and color mode.
bootstrapReadyDescription: Use the new administrator credentials to sign in again.
adminReadyDescription: You can now enter the admin console.

states.twoFactorUnavailable: Two-factor authentication is not enabled in this environment.
states.qrUnavailable: QR code unavailable. Use the manual key instead.

toasts.displayNameRequired: Enter a display name with 3-16 characters
toasts.passwordTooShort: Enter a new password with at least 8 characters and not digits only
toasts.initializedRelogin: Initialization complete. Please sign in again.
toasts.twoFactorNotEnabled: Two-factor status was not enabled. Scan the QR code again.
toasts.twoFactorNotSynced: Two-factor status was not synced. Refresh and try again.
toasts.manualCopy: Select and copy the content manually.

adminTips.upstreams: Manage upstream channels, route bindings, capability declarations, and provider-native parameters from one place.
adminTips.mcp: Configure MCP servers and tool lifecycle with user-side selection, execution limits, retry handling, and full trace display.
adminTips.files: Cover uploads, previews, downloads, text extraction, OCR, RAG retrieval, and original image context injection.
adminTips.context: Combine long-term memory, historical evidence, semantic recall, context truncation, and summary compression for stable continuity.
adminTips.trace: Render processing traces, model thinking, tool calls, inline errors, Markdown, formulas, tables, code blocks, and file cards.
adminTips.admin: Provide unified admin entry points for accounts, identity providers, upstreams, models, billing, logs, chats, files, MCP, and audit logs.
adminTips.ops: Include structured logs, request IDs, Swagger docs, Docker builds, static asset hosting, GeoIP audit, and OpenTelemetry traces.

userTips.profile: Set profile, timezone, and security options so chats, files, tools, and memory match your usage habits.
userTips.models: Use available platform models while routing, quotas, and billing are handled by administrator configuration.
userTips.files: Upload images and files, preview them, extract text, retrieve context, and trace their usage in the conversation.
userTips.conversation: Conversations support branches, sharing, stars, archives, context planning, thinking traces, and tool call details.
userTips.twoFactor: After enabling two-factor authentication, sign-in gets another protection layer and recovery codes protect device loss.
